title: Upon Spenke.
content:
Spenke has a strong breath, yet short prayers saith;
    Not out of want of breath, but want of faith.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "Upon Spenke.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
